title: Hudier
description: Shows a live Paper Doll of your character, riding status, biome, time, and day on your screen. Fully customizable!
body:
# Hudier - The Ultimate Paper Doll & Info HUD

Hudier brings the classic "Paper Doll" feature to Java Edition with a modern twist! See your character in real-time on your screen, along with essential survival information.

## ✨ Features
* **Live Paper Doll:** See your character walking, crouching, swimming, flying, or sleeping.
* **Smart Riding Detection:** Unlike other mods, Hudier correctly renders you **on top of** Horses, Pigs, Camels, Donkeys, and sits you **inside** Boats and Minecarts.
* **Info Panel:** Displays Game Time (24h), Day Count, Current Biome, and Action State.
* **Multi-Language:** Supports over **100 languages**! (English, Turkish, German, Russian, Spanish, French, Chinese, and more).
* **Fully Configurable:** Press **'H'** to toggle or use the config menu to change position, size, background color, and toggle specific info.

## ⚙️ Dependencies
* **Fabric:** Requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api), [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config), and [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu).
* **NeoForge:** Requires [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config).

# by Calfmolten!
